title: habenaria montolivaea
intro: Habenaria montolivaea, also known as Montolive's Habenaria, is a rare species of terrestrial orchid native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infused in water to create a herbal remedy for its medicinal uses.
